Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
  2. ReadOffset

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream.ReadOffset

Packages that use ReadOffset
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
Data structures and interfaces to interact with Redis Streams.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ReadOffset
    ReadOffset.from(String offset)
    Read all arriving elements from the stream starting at offset.
    static ReadOffset
    ReadOffset.from(RecordId offset)
    Read all arriving elements from the stream starting at RecordId.
    ReadOffset
    StreamOffset.getOffset()
     
    static ReadOffset
    ReadOffset.lastConsumed()
    Read all new arriving elements with ids greater than the last one consumed by the consumer group.
    static ReadOffset
    ReadOffset.latest()
    Read from the latest offset.
